data.name: Account_BrandTagline
data.value: Autonomous Business Operating System — detect, decide, act, and learn with human oversight and full traceability.

data.name: Account_EnterMfaCode
data.value: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

data.name: Account_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid credentials. Use the demo email and password; Tenant ID is filled automatically.

data.name: Account_LoginFailed
data.value: Could not sign in. Check your details and try again.

data.name: Account_NoPermissionsMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to view or modify this resource.

data.name: Account_TrustImpact
data.value: Measurable business impact on every autonomous action

data.name: Api_Error_SamlUserNotProvisioned
data.value: SAML user not provisioned in tenant.

data.name: Audit_EventsByTypeSubtitle
data.value: Distribution of events recorded in the system.

data.name: Audit_EventStoreDescription
data.value: All events are stored immutably. The complete system state can be reconstructed from scratch.

data.name: Audit_FooterNote
data.value: AUTONOMUS CRM · Complete audit with Event Sourcing and absolute traceability.

data.name: Audit_FullTraceabilitySubtitle
data.value: Every action can be reconstructed and explained.

data.name: Auth_MfaNotEnabled
data.value: User does not have MFA enabled

data.name: Auth_TenantUnauthorized
data.value: TenantId not authorized for this user.

data.name: Command_LoginPrompt
data.value: Sign in with a valid tenant to view the command center.

data.name: Command_MetricsWillAppear
data.value: Metrics will appear when the autonomous engine records audits.

data.name: Command_NoDecisionsYet
data.value: No autonomous decisions in the last {0} yet.

data.name: Command_Subtitle
data.value: Supervise revenue, autonomous decisions, and workforce from a single control point.

data.name: Common_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Common_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The record does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Customer360_NoCommunications
data.value: No emails, WhatsApp, or calls recorded for this customer.

data.name: Customer360_NoCustomersMessage
data.value: Import or create customers to view Customer 360.

data.name: Customer360_NoEventsMessage
data.value: CRM, revenue, trust, and playbook events will appear here.

data.name: Customer360_SubtitleDefault
data.value: Unified view of revenue, trust, playbooks, and journey.

data.name: Customers_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Fill in the details to register a new customer.

data.name: Customers_Create_Footer
data.value: AUTONOMUS CRM · Intelligent customer management with risk and lifetime value analysis.

data.name: Customers_Detail_CardSubtitle
data.value: Complete customer details and current status.

data.name: Customers_Detail_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this customer? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Customers_Detail_HistoryDevNote
data.value: Feature in development: integration with domain events and audit.

data.name: Customers_Detail_HistoryPlaceholder
data.value: Full history of interactions, events and changes will be shown here.

data.name: Customers_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The customer you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Customers_Subtitle
data.value: Active customer management and lifetime value.

data.name: Dashboard_AiControlSubtitle
data.value: Summary of what AI is doing right now and why.

data.name: Dashboard_CustomerExperienceSubtitle
data.value: What the customer is feeling, and what we do about it.

data.name: Dashboard_DemoRecCall
data.value: Schedule 15-min qualification call with key questions

data.name: Dashboard_DemoRecProposal
data.value: Send personalized proposal with objections resolved

data.name: Dashboard_FeedAlertBody
data.value: "Pending payment" shows high risk due to no response and approaching deadline.

data.name: Dashboard_FeedDecisionBody
data.value: Annual renewal was prioritized due to high close probability and high monthly impact.

data.name: Dashboard_Footer
data.value: AUTONOMUS CRM · Autonomous business management system · Focused on clarity, trust, and fast action.

data.name: Dashboard_PipelineSubtitle
data.value: Opportunity status with automatic recommendations. AI prioritizes actions, detects stalls, and suggests the next best step.

data.name: Dashboard_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search: customer, lead, deal, ticket, activity...

data.name: Deals_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Fill in the details to create a new business opportunity.

data.name: Deals_Create_Footer
data.value: AUTONOMUS CRM · Smart pipeline with automated closing strategy.

data.name: Deals_Detail_CardSubtitle
data.value: Complete deal details and current status.

data.name: Deals_Detail_CloseDealConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to close this deal?

data.name: Deals_Detail_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this deal? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Deals_Detail_FinalAmountHint
data.value: Leave empty to use current amount: {0}

data.name: Deals_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The deal you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Deals_Subtitle
data.value: Enterprise kanban with weighted forecast and pipeline stages.

data.name: Email_Followup_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, we would like to know how your experience with the platform is going.

data.name: Email_Onboarding_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, we have started your onboarding plan. Review your assigned tasks.

data.name: Email_Reengagement_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, it has been a while. Can we help you get back on track?

data.name: Email_Renewal_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, your contract renews on {{renewal_date}}. Let's coordinate the renewal.

data.name: Email_Risk_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, we detected risk signals. Our CS team will contact you.

data.name: Email_Welcome_Body
data.value: Hello {{name}}, thank you for trusting us. Your CS team will contact you soon.

data.name: Error_Message
data.value: An error occurred. Please try again or contact support.

data.name: Error_NotFound_Customer
data.value: Customer not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_NotFound_Deal
data.value: Deal not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_NotFound_Lead
data.value: Lead not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_NotFound_Policy
data.value: Policy not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_NotFound_User
data.value: User not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_NotFound_Workflow
data.value: Workflow not found or does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Error_TenantMismatch
data.value: Resource does not belong to this tenant

data.name: Executive_OsSubtitle
data.value: Business command screen — revenue, risk, AI, and actions in 60 seconds.

data.name: Executive_ReadyMessage
data.value: Connect data or use CEO_DEMO tenant to view revenue, risk, and AI decisions.

data.name: Executive_Subtitle
data.value: Business command screen — revenue, risk, expansion, and decisions.

data.name: Flash_AmountPositive
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: Flash_DbAuthError
data.value: Database authentication error. Please verify credentials in appsettings.json.

data.name: Flash_DbConnectionError
data.value: Database connection error. Please verify PostgreSQL is running and the connection string is correct.

data.name: Flash_DbTimeout
data.value: Database connection timeout. Please verify PostgreSQL is accessible.

data.name: Flash_PageLoadError
data.value: Error loading the page. Please try again.

data.name: FlowComponents_Subtitle
data.value: Live component catalog (Storybook-style) used in AutonomusFlow.

data.name: Import_Api_GuardMessage
data.value: Provide JSON body or CSV/JSON file (max 5MB, 5000 rows).

data.name: Import_Error_FileTooLarge
data.value: File exceeds the maximum of {0} MB.

data.name: Import_Error_NoValidCustomers
data.value: The file does not contain valid customers

data.name: Import_Error_NoValidDeals
data.value: The file does not contain valid deals

data.name: Import_Error_NoValidPolicies
data.value: The file does not contain valid policies

data.name: Import_Error_NoValidUsers
data.value: The file does not contain valid users

data.name: Import_Error_NoValidWorkflows
data.value: The file does not contain valid workflows

data.name: Import_Error_UnsupportedFormat
data.value: Unsupported file format. Use JSON or CSV

data.name: Import_SelectFile
data.value: Select a CSV or JSON file

data.name: Insight_EmailBodyExpansion
data.value: Hi {0}, we identified opportunities to expand your plan.

data.name: Insight_EmailBodyFollowUp
data.value: Hi {0}, we want to make sure everything is going well with your account.

data.name: Insight_EmailBodyRenewal
data.value: Hi {0}, your contract is nearing renewal. Shall we schedule a call?

data.name: Integrations_OAuthNotConfigured
data.value: OAuth is not configured for {0}. Use manual connection.

data.name: Leads_AnalyticsNoScoreHint
data.value: Review leads without a score (enable AI agents or qualify manually).

data.name: Leads_AnalyticsSubtitle
data.value: Sources and summary — not needed for day-to-day

data.name: Leads_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Fill in the details to create a new lead in the system.

data.name: Leads_Create_Footer
data.value: AUTONOMUS CRM · Intelligent lead management with autonomous AI.

data.name: Leads_CreateFirst
data.value: No leads. Create the first one

data.name: Leads_Detail_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this lead? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Leads_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The lead you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Leads_Subtitle
data.value: Prospect list, filters, and commercial actions.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Checklist
data.value: ✓ Which customers will I lose? · ✓ What will I expand? · ✓ Revenue at risk? · ✓ What did AI generate? · ✓ What do I approve today?

data.name: Marketing_Demo_HeroLead
data.value: Walk through the CEO_DEMO tenant with executive data: 50 customers, attributed revenue, 8 Trust approvals, and one-click actions.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step1Desc
data.value: Use the CEO_DEMO tenant (auto-selected in demo environments).

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step2Desc
data.value: Metrics: at-risk customers, expansion-ready, pending decisions, generated revenue (90d). Next Best Actions with executable buttons.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step3Desc
data.value: Generated · Protected · At risk · Expansion · Renewals. Insights with per-customer actions.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step4DescLine1
data.value: Command: revenue at risk, expansions, renewals, live decisions.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step4DescLine2
data.value: Trust: 8 pending approvals — simulate, approve, or reject.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step5DescLine1
data.value: Unified per-customer view: health, tickets, cases, journey, ABOS actions.

data.name: Marketing_Demo_Step5DescLine2
data.value: CS OS: risk, renewals, tickets, playbooks.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_ActionableDesc
data.value: Every insight includes tasks, emails, deals, and Trust approvals. From "I see the risk" to "I acted in one click."

data.name: Marketing_Landing_ExecutiveNativeDesc
data.value: Answers board questions in plain language: which customers am I losing?, what revenue is at risk?, what did AI generate?

data.name: Marketing_Landing_ExpansionDesc
data.value: identifies ready accounts and creates opportunities.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_Hero
data.value: The system that detects, decides, and acts

data.name: Marketing_Landing_Lead
data.value: AutonomusFlow unifies revenue, Customer 360, governed AI, and executable actions. Fewer empty dashboards. More money protected and recovered.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_MetaDescription
data.value: AutonomusFlow detects risk, recommends actions, and executes with human oversight. Protected revenue, avoided churn, governed AI.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_MoneyRiskTitle
data.value: How it makes money · How it reduces risk

data.name: Marketing_Landing_PageTitle
data.value: Autonomous operating system for revenue and customers

data.name: Marketing_Landing_TaglineDesc
data.value: Not another CRM. It's the layer connecting customers, pipeline, AI decisions, and measurable outcomes — with human-in-the-loop before every real impact.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_TypicalResultDesc
data.value: Teams report executive visibility in <5 min, playbooks instead of spreadsheets, and board-ready AI governance.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_VsConsultingDesc
data.value: Autonomous agents + prioritized NBA; humans supervise exceptions.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_VsCopilotsDesc
data.value: Trust Studio: simulate, approve, reject, and rollback before executing.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_VsCrmBiDesc
data.value: Decision → revenue → learning attribution (Outcome Fabric), not just reports.

data.name: Marketing_Landing_VsCsToolsDesc
data.value: Customer 360 + playbooks + tickets in one OS, not five tabs.

data.name: Marketing_Layout_MetaDefault
data.value: AutonomusFlow — autonomous operating system for revenue, customers, and governed AI.

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseBlockers
data.value: Blockers: enterprise references, k6/load evidence, Salesforce bi-directional

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseFeature1
data.value: Everything in Growth + live autonomous agents

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_EnterpriseFeature3
data.value: SOC2 Type II · annual pen test

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_GrowthFeature1
data.value: Everything in Pilot + Customer Success OS

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_GrowthRequirements
data.value: Requires: live integrations, 2 references, SOC2 roadmap

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_HeroLead
data.value: Three entry points aligned to value delivered today — without inflating uncertified capabilities.

data.name: Marketing_Pricing_PilotSubtitle
data.value: 1 tenant · up to 100 customers · self-serve demo

data.name: Marketing_Roi_Assumptions
data.value: Assumptions: 35% of churn is preventable with early intervention · 12% of at-risk renewals recoverable · improvement applied to at-risk + renewal window subset.

data.name: Marketing_Roi_HeroLead
data.value: Estimate AutonomusFlow impact on protected revenue, avoided churn, and recovered renewals.

data.name: Marketing_Roi_Hint
data.value: Adjust your portfolio assumptions. Results are conservative estimates based on B2B SaaS pilot benchmarks.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_BeforeDesc
data.value: Risk visible in a spreadsheet. No owner. No AI traceability. Board asks "what did we do?" — no answer.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_HeroLead
data.value: Representative ABOS flow in AutonomusFlow — based on the CEO_DEMO tenant and production playbooks.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_HeroTitle
data.value: From at-risk customer to protected revenue

data.name: Marketing_Stories_MetricsDesc
data.value: CEO_DEMO: 10 at-risk customers · $2.1M revenue at risk · 15 deals won · 12 AI audits · 8 Trust pending.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_Step1Desc
data.value: Demo Customer 03 — health 42, churn 78%, 30d usage declining, $85k ARR contract. CS sees alert in Customer 360 and CS OS.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_Step2Desc
data.value: Churn engine + Customer Health classify Critical. Flow Command lists the account in "Revenue at risk". Memory records similar pattern with 62% historical rescue success.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_Step3Desc
data.value: Next Best Action: ExecuteRescuePlaybook — executive call within 24h, recovery plan, health follow-up. Trust requests approval (score 82 > threshold).

data.name: Marketing_Stories_Step4Desc
data.value: CS Manager runs "At-risk customer" playbook → 3 tasks created. CSM sends email from insight action. CRO opens $10k retention opportunity. Trust approves AI decision → communication + SLA task.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_Step5Desc
data.value: Ticket closed in 5 days · Health rises to 58 · Renewal confirmed · Outcome Fabric attributes $85k protected revenue to the decision → action → outcome chain. Learning indexed in Memory for the next similar case.

data.name: Marketing_Stories_WithDesc
data.value: Unified detection → recommendation → in-app action → governed approval → measured outcome.

data.name: Operation_Failed
data.value: failed. Check the data and try again.

data.name: Ops_FailedEvents_Empty
data.value: No messages in DLQ for this tenant.

data.name: Ops_FailedEvents_Subtitle
data.value: Persisted failed messages — request replay without simulating automatic success.

data.name: Policies_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Create a new control policy for the autonomous system.

data.name: Policies_Create_ExpressionHint
data.value: Policy expression in logical format. Examples: "amount > 100000", "emailCount < 50", "riskScore > 70"

data.name: Policies_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The policy you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Revenue_Subtitle
data.value: Generated, protected, at-risk revenue and expansion opportunities.

data.name: Settings_Subtitle
data.value: Tenant, AI, security, and workspace communications.

data.name: Shared_EmptyMessage
data.value: There is no information to display in this section yet.

data.name: Shared_FlowEmptyMessage
data.value: When the autonomous system records activity, you will see insights and actions here.

data.name: Trust_SelectHint
data.value: Pick a queue item to review context and outcome fabric.

data.name: Trust_SimulateHint
data.value: Preview outcome if approved. No action runs until you confirm.

data.name: Trust_Subtitle
data.value: Supervise, simulate, and approve autonomous decisions with full traceability.

data.name: Users_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Create a new system user with authentication and permissions.

data.name: Users_Create_Note
data.value: Roles and permissions can be assigned after creating the user from the edit page.

data.name: Users_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The user you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: Validation_Contract_TermMonths
data.value: Term must be at least 1 month.

data.name: Validation_Customer_RiskScoreRange
data.value: Risk score must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: Validation_Deal_AmountPositive
data.value: Deal amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: Validation_Lead_ScoreRange
data.value: Lead score must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: WhatsApp_Recovery
data.value: Hello {{name}}, we noticed inactivity on your account. How can we help?

data.name: WhatsApp_Renewal
data.value: Hello {{name}}, your renewal is on {{renewal_date}}. Shall we schedule a call?

data.name: WhatsApp_Welcome
data.value: Hello {{name}}, welcome to AutonomusFlow. Your CS Manager is available.

data.name: Workflows_Create_CardSubtitle
data.value: Create a new automation workflow for the system.

data.name: Workflows_Create_Note
data.value: Triggers, conditions and actions can be configured after creating the workflow from the edit page.

data.name: Workflows_Edit_NotFoundDesc
data.value: The workflow you are looking for does not exist or was removed.

data.name: University_Subtitle
data.value: Learn by doing — bite-sized lessons, certifications and badges

data.name: University_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Productive in 7 days · Certified in 30 · Expert in 90

data.name: University_RankingNote
data.value: Demo ranking — your progress is saved on this device.
